frontier_inputs: runtime-visible non-semantic structural feature ranks excluding schema semantic columns
adaptive_residual_step: mean positive gap of static rank values within circuit

epfl20_random_vector_main.evidence: Main EPFL20 evidence is evaluated from the current node_debug.csv global_rank/chosen_family outputs for the selected seed; the 5-seed archive is retained only as independent stability evidence.

epfl20_controlled_fi_regression.note: This is the fixed controlled/FI regression table, not the main random-vector EPFL20 result.

note: Standalone runners still contain budget/training/evaluation parameters; this v38 change removes hand-written selector fusion/frontier/arbitration thresholds only.
